_comment: Browser-demo fixture for the cinematic_fullscreen display recipe. Same audio + cover as 01, but with display_directives applied — exercises the engine cascade end-to-end (default → cinematic_fullscreen overrides chrome=none + autoplay=muted). Note: chrome=none means the chrome shell layer is skipped entirely, so the controls' Play button is unavailable; use this fixture to validate the no-chrome render path.
name: Demo — Cinematic Fullscreen
description: Step 5 browser demo of cinematic_fullscreen recipe.
